pullRequest.title: Update RowBuilder.create_table_raw to save PIL image with the jpeg extension
pullRequest.body:
fix https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/issues/647

This pull request updates the `create_table_row` method in `row_builder.py` to include a file extension parameter when preparing media paths. This change ensures that image files are stored with a `.jpeg` extension.

Key change:

* [`pixeltable/exprs/row_builder.py`](diffhunk://#diff-78230fdcfd85f491b5cf246dca1dc8ecc4a19a037c1baf3f2110de5cdfad26e0L451-R458): Modified the `MediaStore.prepare_media_path` call to include an `ext` parameter, specifying `.jpeg` as the file extension for images. This helps standardize image file storage.

pullRequest.title: Fix broken links at the bottom of basics notebook
pullRequest.body:
**Updated notebook reference links in pixeltable-basics.ipynb**

Replaced outdated ReadMe.io documentation links with direct GitHub repository links for three tutorial notebooks:
- Object Detection in Videos: Now points to `use-cases/object-detection-in-videos.ipynb`
- RAG Operations: Now points to `use-cases/rag-operations.ipynb`  
- Working with OpenAI: Now points to `integrations/working-with-openai.ipynb`

All links now reference the notebooks directly in the GitHub repository (`github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/blob/main/docs/notebooks/...`) instead of the legacy ReadMe.io URLs.

Closes https://github.com/pixeltable/pixeltable/issues/845
